[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000 a
1 0000110 2
2 0010100 2
3 1110101 5
4 1001110 4
5 0101110 4
6 1110001 4
7 1001101 4

56 65 1111101 6

70 07 1000111 4
